seoTitle: South Bathurst vs South Coogee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Bathurst and South Coogee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Bathurst vs South Coogee: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Bathurst and South Coogee.
heading: South Bathurst vs South Coogee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Bathurst, New South Wales and South Coogee, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Coogee has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to South Bathurst (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Bathurst or South Coogee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Bathurst has a flood risk score of 43/100, while South Coogee scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Bathurst scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. South Coogee scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Bathurst or South Coogee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Coogee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
